category_sources: source_facts.description: library for manipulation of the macOS .icns resource format; official libicns homepage says it manipulates Mac OS icns/IconFamily resources.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libicns; official homepage title is libicns.
docs_sources: Official libicns homepage links to Documentation; official apidocs page is the project API documentation.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for the project source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies macOS .icns manipulation; official homepage lists icns2png and png2icns tools.
